_publications._publicationTitle: MAF mediates crosstalk between Ras-MAPK and mTOR signaling in NF1.

_contextSnippet: the combination of treatment with 10 or 30 nM RAD001 in addition to MAF overexpression resulted in an enhanced response
details: Combination of 10 or 30 nM RAD001 with MAF overexpression resulted in enhanced response compared to RAD001 alone
